memories.body: For implementation work that spans more than a one-file tweak (multi-file, file+tests, Dockerfile change), file a bead with the agreed plan and sling to a polecat. Stay in Mayor for design + chat. Quick one-file tweaks under ~50 lines stay in Mayor since polecat overhead would swamp them. The polecat workflow is the dogfood of gasDepot — using it is the point.

Every Telegram message from the operator gets an immediate ack via curl POST http://localhost:$GT_BOT_PORT/send before any tool work — something like "Heard, starting on that now." or "Got it, looking." Do NOT send periodic 2-min heartbeats while working — that's noisy. The bot's busy-notice handles the case where a NEW message arrives mid-task automatically; the per-message ack is on you for the first response.
